name: 28-year-old student
history: 28-year-old student. Returned from Egypt. Previously relied on parents for support and is now managing bills, finances, and health insurance independently for the first time. Brother remains financially dependent on parents.

auto_thought: I look hideous and don't want anyone to see me.
